description: A super automatic coffee machine that automates the entire process of making a perfect Barista coffee drink, with numerous options for commercial use in food services, restaurants, and hotels.

components.name: bean_hoppers
components.role: stores coffee beans with capacity up to 4 hoppers, 0.6 kg (positions 3,4) and 1.2 kg (positions 1,2)
components.evidence: Up to 4 x Bean hoppers, 0.6 kg /container - left hand side (Position 3 and 4), 1.2 kg /container - right hand side (Position 1 and 2)

operating_ranges.evidence: 1 x 1 kg bean hopper for single grinder configuration
1 x 0.5 kg bean hopper and 2 x 0.5 kg bean hoppers in various configurations

degradation_mechanisms.driven_by: exposure to air and improper storage
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Only open bags of coffee beans with as much as you need for the day. Store coffee beans in a cool and dry place.

fault_conditions.name: hopper_empty_or_locked
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper right is empty or locked
fault_conditions.symptoms: Please refill or unlock the bean hopper
fault_conditions.evidence: Error Code: S-010, Error Message: Bean hopper right is empty or locked.

fault_conditions.name: hopper_missing_left
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper left/rear missing during process
fault_conditions.symptoms: Bean hopper removed during a process (e.g. during cleaning)
fault_conditions.evidence: E-000 - Bean hopper left missing (Cameo) / Bean hopper rear missing (Enigma/Shotmaster/E'line)

fault_conditions.name: hopper_missing_right
fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper right/front missing during process
fault_conditions.symptoms: Bean hopper removed during a process (e.g. during cleaning)
fault_conditions.evidence: E-001 - Bean hopper right missing (Cameo) / Bean hopper front missing (Enigma/Shotmaster/E'line)

maintenance_actions.name: daily_refill
maintenance_actions.evidence: Only open bags of coffee beans with as much as you need for the day

maintenance_actions.name: hopper_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Ensure that no foreign object get into the bean hopper(s). The grinder may be blocked or damaged.

assumptions.statement: Bean hoppers must be in locked/open position for grinding operation
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'When unlocked the bean hopper is loose, and it will not be possible to grind coffee (closed position)'

assumptions.statement: Different hopper positions have different capacities based on machine configuration
assumptions.reason: Manual shows varying capacities (0.5 kg, 1 kg, 1.2 kg, 0.6 kg) depending on grinder configuration and position

components.name: ceramic_grinders
components.role: grinds coffee beans using Eversys-designed ceramic burrs with powerful yet quiet motor
components.evidence: Up to 4 x Grinders, Ceramic burrs - 64 mm, Eversys-designed ceramic burrs, Powerful yet quiet motor

operating_ranges.evidence: Manual adjustment capability: Grind size adjustment by 1/100 mm increments
Grinding Capacity Bean Hopper Left [mm/s]: 5,50 default, Lower Limit Grinding Capacity Left [mm/s]: 1,00
Grinding Capacity Bean Hopper Right [mm/s]: 5,50 default, Lower Limit Grinding Capacity Right [mm/s]: 1,00
Target extraction time range: 21 to 23 seconds, Average extraction time for two espressos at 25 ml each is 21 to 23 seconds
Bean Hopper Capacity: 1 x 1 kg bean hopper
Bean Hopper Capacities: 1 x 0.5 kg bean hopper

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The service of Eversys coffee machines depends on the number of brewing chambers: Légacy range: 12 months or every 50'000 products

fault_conditions.description: Bean hopper right is empty or locked
fault_conditions.symptoms: Please refill or unlock the bean hopper

fault_conditions.name: grinder_blocked
fault_conditions.description: The grinder may be blocked or damaged

fault_conditions.evidence: Ensure that no foreign object get into the bean hopper(s). The grinder may be blocked or damaged.

maintenance_actions.name: service_maintenance

maintenance_actions.name: powder_mixer_interval
maintenance_actions.evidence: Powder mixer interval [day(s)]: 1 default

assumptions.statement: Grinder burrs are sharp cutting components that require safety precautions

assumptions.reason: Manual indicates 'When unlocked the bean hopper is loose, and it will not be possible to grind coffee (closed position).'

components.name: brewing_chamber
components.role: 24 gram capacity chamber for coffee brewing with electronic tamping
components.evidence: 1 x 24 g brew chamber, Electronic tamping to guarantee consistent quality

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Automatic levelling initiates movement to the brewing chamber, creates vibration which enables powder in the chamber to spread more evenly
Electronic tamping to guarantee consistent quality

fault_conditions.symptoms: Coffee dispensed is watery

maintenance_actions.name: product_test_runs

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: accelerated when water filter exceeds life cycle

components.role: processes milk for beverages with Electronic Milk Texturing capability
components.evidence: Electronic Milk Texturing (EMT) (coffee outlet), Milk is frothed with air only in the one-step system

operating_ranges.evidence: Make sure that the fridge is switched on and operating correctly. Check that the temperature is not higher then 3°C

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Only use cooled milk (pasteurised, homogenised or UHT). Check that the temperature is not higher then 3°C
Always clean your hands before refilling milk. Germs can be introduced from dirty hands when opening

fault_conditions.name: lactose_cross_contamination

fault_conditions.evidence: If using e.g. regular milk on milk tank #1 and e.g. soy milk on milk tank #2, it is not possible to guarantee Lactose-Free Milk on milk tank #2

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tank_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the milk tank with soft soap, rinse under running drinking water and dry it

maintenance_actions.name: milk_system_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the milk tank and store it in a fridge during the cleaning process. If necessary clean the milk tank with warm water and soft soap

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tube_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the milk tank tube with a damp single-use cloth

assumptions.statement: Milk system uses Electronic Milk Texturing for foam control

assumptions.statement: Milk is frothed using air-only injection system

flow_paths.evidence: system will take suitable quantities of beans and grind them according to the product needs, supply them to the appropriate brew chamber
Reverse gravity extraction vertical infusion, brew and dispense the product according to your request
Steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar and the boiler starts to heat to the nominal value
Milk is frothed with air only in the one-step system, Electronic Milk Texturing (EMT)
Pressure 2.5 - 4 bars (36.3 - 58 psi), Flow rate > 140 L/h

operation_sequence.evidence: Switch on at the main power switch, Initialise, please wait, Coffee boiler is heating, Steam boiler is heating

operation_sequence.description: Bean grinding according to product requirements
operation_sequence.evidence: system will take suitable quantities of beans and grind them according to the product needs

operation_sequence.description: Coffee powder leveling and tamping in brewing chamber
operation_sequence.evidence: Automatic levelling initiates movement to the brewing chamber, creates vibration which enables powder in the chamber to spread more evenly, Electronic tamping to guarantee consistent quality

operation_sequence.description: Coffee extraction using reverse gravity method
operation_sequence.evidence: Reverse gravity extraction vertical infusion, Optimises powder efficiency as the espresso is produced

operation_sequence.description: Milk processing if required for beverage
operation_sequence.evidence: Milk is frothed with air only in the one-step system, Electronic Milk Texturing (EMT)
All products are pre-programmed to be dispensed in a consistent and efficient manner
Empty and clean the grounds drawer, Grounds drawer 400 g

operating_ranges.evidence: This message occurs if the steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar and the boiler starts to heat to the nominal value

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: after water filter life time cycle
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: The water filter has to be changed after its life time cycle. Otherwise the boilers will be damaged due to the limescale

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_heating
fault_conditions.description: Steam boiler is heating
fault_conditions.symptoms: occurs if the steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar
fault_conditions.evidence: This message occurs if the steam boiler pressure is below 0.8 bar and the boiler starts to heat to the nominal value

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_emptied
fault_conditions.description: Please switch off the machine
fault_conditions.symptoms: occurs if the steam boiler has been emptied or depressurized
fault_conditions.evidence: This message occurs if the steam boiler has been emptied or depressurized. The coffee machine has to be switched off (main switch)

fault_conditions.name: empty_steam_boiler
fault_conditions.description: Empty steam boiler
fault_conditions.evidence: Empty steam boiler... Contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: depressurise_steam_boiler
fault_conditions.description: Depressurise steam boiler
fault_conditions.evidence: Depressurise steam boiler... Contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: fill_steam_boiler
fault_conditions.description: Fill steam boiler
fault_conditions.symptoms: water level is lower than the safety level
fault_conditions.evidence: If the water level is lower than the safety level the steam boiler has to be filled

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_rinse_required
fault_conditions.description: Rinse necessary. The steam boiler isn't allowed to heat before the machine is rinsed
fault_conditions.symptoms: steam boiler has to wait until the rinse button is pressed before it is allowed to heat
fault_conditions.evidence: After switching on the coffee machine, the steam boiler has to wait until the rinse button is pressed before it is allowed to heat

fault_conditions.name: steam_boiler_security_probe_problem
fault_conditions.description: Steam boiler security probe problem
fault_conditions.evidence: Steam boiler security probe problem. Contact service organisation

fault_conditions.name: steam_pressure_too_low
fault_conditions.description: Steam pressure too low for milk products
fault_conditions.symptoms: insufficient steam pressure to produce milk product
fault_conditions.evidence: Wait until the steam pressure is high enough to produce a milk product

maintenance_actions.name: steam_wand_purge
maintenance_actions.evidence: After every use of the steam wand (steam arm) it is necessary to wipe and purge it

maintenance_actions.name: startup_purge
maintenance_actions.evidence: To initialise the coffee machine, it is necessary to press the blinking purge button after each start-up

maintenance_actions.name: water_filter_change
maintenance_actions.evidence: The water filter has to be changed after its life time cycle. Otherwise the boilers will be damaged due to the limescale

assumptions.statement: Steam boiler is part of the 0.8L boiler system for steam generation
assumptions.reason: Manual references steam boiler separately from coffee boiler, and component role specifies steam generation function

assumptions.statement: Hot water dispensing can be controlled by either steam boiler or coffee boiler
assumptions.reason: Manual shows hot water quantity can be set in seconds (steam boiler) or ticks (coffee boiler)

operating_ranges.evidence: 1 to 4 layers (up to 15 products per layer depending on settings)

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: requires cleaning after each use period
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: disinfect the screen according to the following recommendation

fault_conditions.name: action_required_indicator
fault_conditions.description: blinking button indicates user needs to perform an action
fault_conditions.symptoms: button blinking on display
fault_conditions.evidence: A blinking button indicates that the user needs to perform an action

maintenance_actions.name: screen_cleaning
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: surface contamination and prevents accidental product activation
maintenance_actions.evidence: Press on the Clean the screen button... The countdown allows to clean the screen without the risk of starting a product

maintenance_actions.name: language_import
maintenance_actions.evidence: Languages can be imported by pressing Start Import

maintenance_actions.name: screen_import
maintenance_actions.evidence: Screens can be imported by pressing Start Import

assumptions.statement: Touch screen operates at 10.1 inch size as specified in component role
assumptions.reason: Size not explicitly stated in manual excerpts but provided in component description

assumptions.statement: Screen cleaning countdown prevents accidental activation during maintenance
assumptions.reason: Manual states countdown allows cleaning without risk of starting a product

operating_ranges.evidence: collects used coffee grounds with 400g capacity

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Once the grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes, empty it

fault_conditions.name: drawer_full
fault_conditions.description: grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes
fault_conditions.symptoms: system requests emptying
fault_conditions.evidence: Once the grounds drawer is full with coffee cakes, empty it according to the following steps and the instructions displayed

maintenance_actions.name: empty_and_clean_grounds_drawer
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the grounds drawer (1). Empty the grounds drawer, clean and dry it. Replace the grounds drawer (1)

maintenance_actions.name: cleaning_procedure_grounds_drawer
maintenance_actions.evidence: Empty the grounds drawer in a sink and clean it with soft soap. Rinse and dry the grounds drawer

assumptions.statement: Grounds drawer may contain hot water after cleaning cycles
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'After first startup or during cleaning, the grounds drawer may contain hot water, empty it carefully'

assumptions.statement: Coffee grounds are environmentally disposable
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Coffee grounds may be composted or recycled with organic waste'

fault_conditions.name: water_flow_left_too_low
fault_conditions.description: Water flow left too low
fault_conditions.evidence: W-004 - Hydraulic Module: Water flow left too low

fault_conditions.name: water_flow_right_too_low
fault_conditions.description: Water flow right too low
fault_conditions.evidence: W-005 - Hydraulic Module: Water flow right too low

maintenance_actions.name: close_main_water_inlet_tap
maintenance_actions.interval: specific conditions (e.g. long term storage, actions on water pump ...)
maintenance_actions.evidence: On specific conditions (e.g. long term storage, actions on water pump ...), close the main water inlet tap (3)

assumptions.statement: Water pump is part of the hydraulic module that supplies water to brewing and steam systems
assumptions.reason: Warning codes W-004 and W-005 for low water flow are categorized under 'Hydraulic Module' and the component role specifies water supply to brewing and steam systems

assumptions.statement: Different machine models have different flow rate requirements from the water pump
assumptions.reason: Manual specifies different minimum flow rates for different machine models, indicating pump capacity varies by model

operating_ranges.evidence: Make sure that the fridge is switched on and operating correctly. Check that the temperature is not higher then 3°C

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Only use cooled milk (pasteurised, homogenised or UHT). Check that the temperature is not higher then 3°C
Always clean your hands before refilling milk. Germs can be introduced from dirty hands when opening

fault_conditions.name: lactose_cross_contamination
fault_conditions.description: Cannot guarantee lactose-free milk on tank #2 when using dual milk types
fault_conditions.evidence: If using e.g. regular milk on milk tank #1 and e.g. soy milk on milk tank #2, it is not possible to guarantee Lactose-Free Milk on milk tank #2

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tank_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the milk tank with soft soap, rinse under running drinking water and dry it

maintenance_actions.name: milk_system_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the milk tank and store it in a fridge during the cleaning process. If necessary clean the milk tank with warm water and soft soap

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tube_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Clean the milk tank tube with a damp single-use cloth

assumptions.statement: Milk system uses Electronic Milk Texturing for foam control
assumptions.reason: Component role specifies Electronic Milk Texturing capability but manual excerpts don't detail the electronic control mechanism

assumptions.statement: Milk is frothed using air-only injection system
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Milk is frothed with air only in the one-step system' but doesn't specify pressure or flow rates

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Clean all under clean tap water with soft soap. Dry the parts
Ensure that no foreign object gets into the mixers. This may block or damage them

fault_conditions.name: mixer_blockage
fault_conditions.description: Mixer blocked or damaged by foreign objects
fault_conditions.symptoms: Dispensing mechanism malfunction
fault_conditions.evidence: Ensure that no foreign object gets into the mixers. This may block or damage them

fault_conditions.name: incompatible_grinder_configuration
fault_conditions.description: Powder unit incompatible with 4 grinders option
fault_conditions.symptoms: Configuration conflict
fault_conditions.evidence: incompatible with the use of 4 grinders option

maintenance_actions.name: mixer_cleaning_disassembly
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: powder residue buildup in mixer components
maintenance_actions.evidence: Separate the mixer (tube, powder chanel, base and cover). Clean all under clean tap water with soft soap. Dry the parts

maintenance_actions.name: powder_container_refill
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the cover(s). Fill with powder. Replace the cover(s)

maintenance_actions.name: dispenser_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: clean with a clean cloth each dispenser

assumptions.statement: Powder unit uses auger or screw-type dispensing mechanism
assumptions.reason: Manual shows internal dispensing mechanism in technical diagram but does not specify exact mechanism type

assumptions.statement: Powder containers have graduated measurement markings
assumptions.reason: Visual diagram shows measurement markings but specific graduations are not detailed in text

maintenance_actions.name: clean_drip_tray
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: removes accumulated liquid and debris from drip tray
maintenance_actions.evidence: Remove the drip tray grid (1). Wash the grid and inside of the drip tray (2) with soft soap and rinse. Replace the drip tray grid (1).

assumptions.statement: No specific operating parameters or fault conditions are documented for the drip tray component
assumptions.reason: Manual excerpts focus on cleaning procedures but do not provide technical specifications, operating ranges, or failure modes specific to the drip tray

operating_ranges.evidence: It takes approximately 12 minutes to complete the entire process
Press and hold the rinse (1) button for 3 s to run automatic cleaning

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Regular cleaning is mandatory in order to ensure problem-free operation of the machine and to ensure optimum coffee quality
If care and cleaning of the machine is not carried out properly, dispensing milk beverages will constitute a food hygiene hazard point

fault_conditions.name: cleaning_required_lockout
fault_conditions.description: Machine prevents drink preparation when cleaning is required
fault_conditions.symptoms: not possible to make a drink unless cleaning is performed
fault_conditions.evidence: if cancelled and depending on settings, it will not be possible to make a drink unless cleaning is performed

maintenance_actions.name: automatic_system_cleaning_eversys_cleaning_ball
maintenance_actions.evidence: Automatic system cleaning Eversys cleaning ball™ [87] - Daily (auto)

maintenance_actions.name: automatic_system_rinse
maintenance_actions.evidence: Automatic system rinse [51] - Daily (auto)

maintenance_actions.name: visual_inspection_cleaning_balls_dispensers
maintenance_actions.evidence: Visual inspection cleaning balls dispensers on Légacy [87] - Or as required

maintenance_actions.name: milk_tank_cleaning
maintenance_actions.evidence: Milk tank and milk fridge [95] (machine option) - Daily (auto)

assumptions.statement: Cleaning operations are automatically logged by the system
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'All automatic cleaning operations are logged' but does not specify logging mechanism details

assumptions.statement: EvercleanTM and Eversys cleaning ballTM are the standard cleaning agents
assumptions.reason: Manual identifies these as proprietary cleaning products but does not specify chemical composition or alternative products
